title: Air freshening device
abstract: An air freshening device is provided. The device includes a water-based fragrance emitter including water, a water absorbing polymer and a fragrance composition. The fragrance composition includes from about 3% to about 70% by weight of at least one fragrance ingredient exhibiting a standard equilibrium headspace concentration (formula (I)) below about 100 Î¼g/L. The water-based fragrance emitter provides a working signal and an end of life signal upon evaporation. The air freshening device is a warming device.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. An air freshening device comprising: a water-based fragrance emitter including water, a water absorbing polymer and a fragrance composition, the fragrance composition having from about 3% to about 70% by weight of at least one fragrance ingredient exhibiting a standard equilibrium headspace HSÂ° concentration ( ' ) below about 100 Î¼ /Î; wherein the water-based fragrance emitter provides a working signal and an end of life signal upon evaporation, and wherein the air freshening device is a warming device. 2. The air freshening device according to claim 1 , wherein the water-based fragrance emitter comprises a plurality of water beads. 3. The air freshening device according to claim I , wherein the water absorbing polymer is a cross-linked hydrophilic polymer. 4. The air freshening device according to claim 3, wherein the cross-linked hydrophilic polymer is a partially cross-linked copolymer selected from the group consisting of partially saponified (meth)acrylic acid, alkyl acrylates, hydroxyl alkyl acrylates and mixtures thereof. 5. The air freshening device according to claim 1 , wherein the at least one fragrance ingredient is selected from the group consisting of Cashmeran, Galaxolide, Galaxolide S, Moxalone, Cosmone, Thibetolide, Velvione, Muscenone, Nirvanolide, Habanolide, Civettone, C14 musk, Ethylene Brassylate, Ambrcttolidc, Scrcnolidc, Sylkolidc, Silvanonc, Citronellyl Ethoxalatc, Hclvctolidc, Romandolide, Pentambrcttc, Applelide, Rosamusk, Cyclomusk, Acetyl Iso Eugenol, Acetyl Vanillin, Amber Core, Amberketal, Ambermax Ambrocenide, Ambrofix, Ambrox, Ambroxan, Azurone, Calone, Cedrol, Cedryl Acetate, Cetalox, Cinnamic Acid, Cinnamyl Cinnymate, Corylone, Coumarin, Cresyl Phenyl Acetate, Cynnamyl Cinnamate, Ethyl Maltol, Ethyl Vanillin, Evernyl, Hedione, Homofuronol, Indole, Maltol, Methyl Cinnamate, Mystikal, Neroline, Oranger Crystal, Orcinyl-3, Petalia, Phenyl Acetic Acid, Phenyl Ethyl Cinnamate, Hexyl Cinnamic Aldehyde, Phenyl Ethyl Salicyclate, Vanillin, Yara Yara and mixtures thereof. 

 The air freshening device according to claim 1 , further comprising from about 0% to about 50% by weight of at least a second fragrance ingredient exhibiting a standard HSÂ° equilibrium headspace concentration ( ) above about 1000 Î¼g/L. The air freshening device according to claim 1 , wherein the working signal is selected from color change and size reduction. The air freshening device according to claim 1 , wherein the water-based fragrance emitter includes up to about 5% by weight of the water absorbing polymer and up to about 15% by weight of the fragrance composition. An air freshening device comprising: a water-based fragrance emitter including water and a fragrance composition having from about 5% to about 50% by weight of at least one fragrance ingredient exhibiting a standard equilibrium headspace concentration ( wherein upon evaporation, the water-based fragrance emitter is easily removable, and wherein the air freshening device is a warming device. The air freshening device according to claim 9, wherein upon evaporation the amount of fragrance residue remaining in the device is less than about 1.0% by weight of the emitter. 14. An air freshening device comprising: a water-based fragrance emitter including a plurality of beads comprising a water absorbing polymer and a fragrance composition; wherein the fragrance emitter has a fragrance intensity of greater than about 1 on a scale of from zero to five after 5 minutes; and wherein the air freshening device is a warming device. 15.
